name: Brisbane Ross River Virus Polyarthritis Cohort (Mylonas)
aliases: Ross River virus natural history cohort
denominator_method: Patients diagnosed with Ross River virus disease by general practitioners (clinical symptoms plus paired serology) in greater Brisbane, followed prospectively.
time_zero_definition: Diagnosis of acute Ross River virus disease
notes: Prospective questionnaire-based natural-history study following joint symptoms and quality of life to 12 months; showed progressive resolution over 3–6 months in most patients. Enrolled sample size not captured here (pending human extraction from the primary paper).

publications.title: Natural history of Ross River virus-induced epidemic polyarthritis
publications.authors: Mylonas AD, Brown AM, Carthew TL, et al.
